title: Research Quality Assessment: Digital Transformation Initiative
summary: Research provides strong quantitative evidence from peer institutions with specific cost reduction metrics. Date specificity is adequate for quarterly Gantt intervals, though some implementation milestones lack precise timing.
keyFindings: Strong peer benchmarking data with specific cost reduction percentages from JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs
Internal audit data provides precise cost baseline ($4.2M annual) for ROI modeling
Implementation timelines are primarily quarterly rather than monthly, limiting Gantt granularity

themes.name: Cloud Migration
themes.description: Technical migration from legacy on-premise infrastructure to cloud-native architecture
strengths: Clear phase definitions with quarterly milestones
Specific cost metrics tied to each phase
gaps: Exact start dates for Phase 2 and Phase 3 not specified
recommendations: Add specific vendor evaluation dates from procurement records
Include Phase 2 kickoff date from project charter

themes.name: Operational Transformation
themes.description: Business process redesign to leverage new cloud capabilities
strengths: Clear dependency on cloud migration timeline
recommendations: Add training schedule with specific dates from HR planning documents
Include change management phase gates from project management office

criticalGaps: Phase 2 and Phase 3 migration start dates need clarification
Vendor selection timeline is entirely absent

suggestedSources.reason: Would provide specific phase dates and milestone definitions
suggestedSources.expectedImprovement: Could increase overall score from 7.2 to 8.5+ with precise date data

suggestedSources.reason: Vendor selection is a critical path item with no date coverage
suggestedSources.expectedImprovement: Would fill the vendor selection gap and add 3-4 Gantt tasks

actionItems.action: Obtain project charter with phase start/end dates for cloud migration
Request vendor evaluation timeline from procurement team
Add training and change management milestones from HR planning
